title: eragrostis oligostachya
intro: Eragrostis oligostachya, also known as blue grama grass, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of blue grama grass include the potential to alleviate symptoms of various conditions, such as arthritis and digestive issues, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing. The herbal preparations of Eragrostis oligostachya typically involve drying the grass and using it as a tea or tincture, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
